title: CBIC Issues Circular for Smooth Implementation of Safeguard Duty Exemptions on Steel Flat Products
content:
# CBIC Issues Circular for Smooth Implementation of Safeguard Duty Exemptions on Steel Flat Products

Ek important update hai! Government ne "Non-Alloy and Alloy Steel Flat Products" par safeguard duty exemptions ke smooth implementation ke liye ek naya circular announce kiya hai.

Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne Circular No. 23/2026-Customs dated May 07, 2026, issue kiya hai. Is circular ka main objective hai ki Notification No. 02/2025-Customs (SG) dated December 30, 2025, ke तहत लगाई गई safeguard duty, exempted imports par na lage aur imports ka clearance smooth ho.

**Key Highlights:**

*   **Background:** Safeguard duty was imposed on certain "Non-Alloy and Alloy Steel Flat Products" via Notification No. 02/2025-Customs (SG) dated December 30, 2025. This notification also included provisions for exemptions.
*   **Purpose of the Circular:** To streamline the process and ensure that eligible imports are not subjected to safeguard duty.
*   **Mechanism Introduced:** CBIC has introduced system-based qualifiers (INFO Codes) in the Single Window Table of the Bill of Entry. Importers seeking exemption must now declare specific details using these designated INFO Codes while filing Bills of Entry electronically.
*   **Exemption Categories:** The circular details INFO Codes for exemptions based on three categories:
    *   CIF Value-Based Exemptions (for products imported at or above notified CIF value thresholds).
    *   Developing Country-Based Exemptions (for imports from specified developing countries, with some exclusions).
    *   Product-Specific Exclusions (like CRGO steel, stainless steel, tinplate, coated steel products, etc., which are outside the scope of safeguard duty).
*   **Implementation:** Directorate General of Systems (DG Systems) has been directed to issue necessary advisories for electronic filing, and field formations are instructed to ensure uniform implementation and trade awareness.

This move se trade facilitation improve hogi, disputes kam honge, aur customs clearance mein transparency aur efficiency badhegi.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://cbic.gov.in/Customs-Circulars)

*Published on: 9 May 2026*
